description: You are documenting the OAuth 2.0 protocol for a payment API. Complete the partial sequence diagram at ~/Diagrams/oauth2_flow.drawio based on the specification in ~/Desktop/oauth2_sequence_spec.txt. On 'Page-1', add 'Token Store' and 'Resource Server' lifelines. Model the 'Token Exchange' phase (messages 7-10) involving the Client, Auth Server, and Token Store, and the 'Resource Access' phase (messages 11-15) involving the Client, Resource Server, and Auth Server. Include a UML 'alt' fragment for the Resource Access validation showing success (200 OK) and failure (401 Unauthorized) cases. Create a second page named 'Token Refresh Flow' modeling the process where the Client uses a refresh_token to get a new access_token, including Client, Auth Server, and Token Store lifelines. Export the complete diagram as an SVG to ~/Diagrams/exports/oauth2_flow.svg.
